title: Lethal
description: Lethal, is a donut smp mod , This will help you in many ways of making money and visuals in general
body:
**Lethal.**

 KEY TO OPEN IS G 
THIS IS CHANGABLE INSIDE KEYBINDS

**What we offer.**

Skeleton Spawner Tracking.

auto Calculator

works for 1b1 2b2 and that goes up to 64b64

 

**Gambling Helper**

Helps you track your losses and wins

well gambling.

This is all auto once the option is turned on it will capture your payments going in and out.

 

**Player Lookup's**

Lookup a players stats

Locate what world the player is in 

such as Nether,End,Overworld

 

**Player Detection**

Afking skeles?

Well you can now see when players are close to.


**Info Panel**

FPS Counter

Ping

Totems

Crystals

Golden Apples

 

**Custom Corsshair**

Cross

Dot

Cross + Dot

Circle

Circle + Dot

T-Shape

And fully customizable colors

 

**Timers **

Alerts when your drill is about to run out

 

**Configs**

Save your own config with the options you selected.

And alot more.
